subcodes.first_line: Although this evil state in which I am, O my God, maketh me deserving of Thy wrath and punishment, Thy good pleasure and Thy bounties demand Thy forgiveness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ولو ان سوء حالی یا الهی استحقنی لسیاطک و عذابک ولکن حسن عطوفتک و مواهبک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for protection, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @justice and wrath of God
